title: Cycle Trading Signal plugged into AI Lists 🔥

comments.body: You get your Cycle list ! Make a watch list with it and set the list to change gains and you pick from the middle between red and green which are the ones moving up and picked them apart from there always sell whe targets hit or on your own evaluation.

comments.body: Don't do it with the old list. The  calls already expire . New calls  are 12/2025
